subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Book of Dawn hath risen from the horizon of My Revelation, and through It the land hath been illumined
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرق کتاب الفجر من افق الامر و اضائت به الدیار هذا یوم فیه تنطق الاشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God
